_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in A1/006 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Sam; computer plays Lily. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 006 · The Snowman

routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Yes! Let's make a snowman.”

routes.meaning: Sam wants to go play in the snow.
examples: Let's go play in the snow!
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Yes! Let's make a snowman.”

partial.message: Make a plan: “Yes! Let's make a snowman.”

off_topic.message: It snowed! Say “Yes! Let's make a snowman.”

npc.text: Great idea! First, let's make a snowman.

routes.meaning: Sam agrees to make a snowman.

off_topic.message: First a snowman! Say “Let's make a snowman!”

npc.text: I made a big snowball for the body.

routes.meaning: Sam made a small snowball for the head.
examples: I made a small one for the head.
I made a small snowball for the head.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “I made a small one for the head.”
💬 Try saying: “I made a small one for the head.”

partial.message: Tell Lily: “I made a small one for the head.”

off_topic.message: Lily made the body. Say “I made a small one for the head.”

npc.text: Yes, please! Let's make the head next.

routes.meaning: Sam made a small snowball for the head.
examples: I made a small one for the head.
I made a small snowball for the head.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “I made a small one for the head.”

partial.message: Tell Lily: “I made a small one for the head.”

off_topic.message: Let's make the head. Say “I made a small one for the head.”

npc.text: We used a carrot for the nose.

routes.meaning: Sam adds two rocks for the eyes.
examples: And two rocks for the eyes.
We used two rocks for the eyes.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “And two rocks for the eyes.”

examples: What can we use for the arms?
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “And two rocks for the eyes.”

partial.message: Add to the snowman: “And two rocks for the eyes.”

off_topic.message: The nose is a carrot. Say “And two rocks for the eyes.”

npc.text: Good idea! We can use two sticks for the arms. Now the eyes!

routes.meaning: Sam adds two rocks for the eyes.
examples: And two rocks for the eyes.
We used rocks for the eyes.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “And two rocks for the eyes.”

partial.message: Say “And two rocks for the eyes.”

off_topic.message: Now the eyes! Say “And two rocks for the eyes.”

routes.meaning: Sam says it was so cold outside.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “It was so cold outside.”
💬 Try saying: “It was so cold outside.”

partial.message: Tell Lily: “It was so cold outside.”

off_topic.message: The snowman looks great! Say “It was so cold outside.”

npc.text: But it was a lot of fun.

examples: Let's drink some hot cocoa now.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Let's drink some hot cocoa now.”

routes.meaning: Sam wants to build another snowman.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Let's drink some hot cocoa now.”

partial.message: Suggest a drink: “Let's drink some hot cocoa now.”

off_topic.message: It was fun but cold. Say “Let's drink some hot cocoa now.”

npc.text: Ha! Maybe later. First, let's warm up.

examples: Let's drink some hot cocoa now.
routes.hint: 💬 Try saying: “Let's drink some hot cocoa now.”

partial.message: Say “Let's drink some hot cocoa now.”

off_topic.message: Let's warm up. Say “Let's drink some hot cocoa now.”

npc.text: Yes! Hot cocoa is the best. Good job today, Sam!
